mapper.sql: order_id, order_no, user_id, store_id, total_amount, delivery_fee, discount_amount, pay_amount, status, address, phone, remark, create_time, update_time
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET order_no = #{orderNo}, user_id = #{userId}, store_id = #{storeId}, total_amount = #{totalAmount}, delivery_fee = #{deliveryFee}, discount_amount = #{discountAmount}, pay_amount = #{payAmount}, status = #{status}, address = #{address}, phone = #{phone}, remark = #{remark}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.select: SELECT o.*, s.store_name FROM orders o LEFT JOIN stores s ON o.store_id = s.store_id WHERE o.order_id = #{orderId}
SELECT o.*, s.store_name FROM orders o LEFT JOIN stores s ON o.store_id = s.store_id WHERE o.order_no = #{orderNo}
SELECT o.*, s.store_name FROM orders o LEFT JOIN stores s ON o.store_id = s.store_id WHERE o.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY o.create_time DESC
SELECT o.*, s.store_name FROM orders o LEFT JOIN stores s ON o.store_id = s.store_id WHERE o.store_id = #{storeId} ORDER BY o.create_time DESC
SELECT o.*, s.store_name FROM orders o LEFT JOIN stores s ON o.store_id = s.store_id WHERE o.status = #{status} ORDER BY o.create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET status = #{status}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
